---
title: "The Exposure Triangle"
subtitle: "A Quarto RevealJS extension"
author: "Paolo Bosetti, Witness Journal"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: dark
    width: 1280
    height: 800
---


# Exposure Triangle

## Full auto {.smaller}

Drag a dial, or tap **AUTO** to hand it back to the camera.

{{< exposure-triangle >}}

## Custom accent + auto-spin

{{< exposure-triangle accent="#2A6FDB" spin=true >}}

## Aperture priority, no floor grid

{{< exposure-triangle accent="#E0567A" floor-grid=false width="100%" height="640px" >}}

## How to embed

```` markdown
{{{< exposure-triangle >}}}

{{{< exposure-triangle accent="#2A6FDB" spin=true >}}}

{{{< exposure-triangle floor-grid=false scene="my-photo.png" width="100%" height="640px" >}}}
````

All attributes from the README map to shortcode arguments:
`accent`, `scene`, `floor-grid`, `spin`, `three-src`, plus `height` / `width`.


# Author

Paolo Bosetti, Witness Journal
